StepAction: Parent Session running; trigger condition for subagent spawn arrives (review / compact / memgen / agent task)
Caller picks a SubAgentSource variant (Review / Compact / ThreadSpawn{parent_thread_id, depth, ...} / MemoryConsolidation / Other(label))

run_codex_thread_interactive inherits parent_session.installation_id (line 79) + services (auth_manager/models/env/skills/plugins/mcp); rewrites session_source = SessionSource::SubAgent(subagent_source); sets thread_source = Some(ThreadSource::Subagent)
Codex::spawn → Session::new (Ch03 C5): child conversation_id = ThreadId::default() (fresh UUID v7); window_generation = 0; same installation_id as parent

build_subagent_headers/build_responses_identity_headers/build_ws_client_metadata emit x-openai-subagent (+ optional x-codex-parent-thread-id) into the per-turn header set OR WS client_metadata depending on transport (Ch06/Ch08/Ch09)
Continue per-turn cycle; on next turn loop back to label/parent_thread_id resolution (state stable across turns)
Add x-openai-memgen-request: true (HeaderValue::from_static); continue per-turn cycle
Subagent completes; results returned to parent_session; child Session drops; cached WS connection (if any) released
